hooks.command: $input = $Input | ConvertFrom-Json; $entry = @{ts=(Get-Date -Format o); session=$input.session_id; cmd=$input.tool_input.command} | ConvertTo-Json -Compress; $logDir = Join-Path $env:CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR '.claude/logs'; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $logDir | Out-Null; Add-Content -Path (Join-Path $logDir 'audit.jsonl') -Value $entry
